displayNameZh: AI 看图不理解语意的视觉解说
summary: Yt Ai Not Understand component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「AI 看图不理解语意的视觉解说」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-ai-not-understand/src/YtAiNotUnderstand.tsx` and `remotion/yt-ai-not-understand/src/runtime-assets.ts` into your Remotion project, import `YtAiNotUnderstand` and `ytAiNotUnderstandDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Ai Not Understand Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-ai-not-understand to my project. Copy both the component file and runtime-assets.ts. Preserve the exported YtAiNotUnderstandProps API and register the YtAiNotUnderstand composition with the default props.
